title: Old Ores Bare Bones Edition
description: A simple texture pack that makes all the ores of the Bare Bones texture pack have the pre-1.17 ore look.
body:
![Old Ores Bare Bones Edition With Simplified Pre-1.17 Minecraft Ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0f514b020c26dbd879a5d038cfd90fcd9d1d730.png)
### Changes all the ores in the Bare Bones pack to look like the pre-1.17 textures!
### **This pack includes every ore in the Bare Bones style!** #### **Diamonds, Gold, Iron, Coal, Emeralds, Lapis Lazuli, Redstone, and even their deepslate varients!**
**To install, just make sure texture pack is above the existing Bare Bones pack by RobotPants!**
